what_was_built: reports/crypto_d1_qa_freeze_spec_v1/qa_freeze_spec.json (machine-readable Crypto-D1 QA/Freeze specification; 7 check groups A..G; 9 per-group check sections; 6-status QA model; 26-field QA report schema; 14 freeze rules)

reports/crypto_d1_qa_freeze_spec_v1/qa_freeze_spec.md (human-readable: required + forbidden inputs; A..G check group narratives; 6-status QA model with distinction statements; 26-field QA report schema table; freeze rules; allowed/forbidden next steps; no-profit-claim policy)
tests/test_crypto_d1_qa_freeze_spec.py (33 tests covering schema + safety + validator failure modes + no-real-data-files + tool stdlib-only + integration with prior bundles)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: crypto_d1_protocol seed extended via extra_files to include the new qa_freeze_spec docs (lane stays WATCH; never ACTIVE / never STRONG)

follows_contract_manifest_protocol.phase_satisfied: P2_dataset_manifest_freeze (QA layer of the spec; the future QA harness implementation is a SEPARATE, separately-authorized P2 bundle)

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: Clean daily OHLCV data does not imply profit
A QA report cannot authorize paper or live trading
A QA report cannot authorize backtesting by itself
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested

tests_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_crypto_d1_qa_freeze_spec.py tests/test_crypto_d1_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_crypto_d1_data_contract.py tests/test_crypto_d1_protocol.py tests/test_arbitrage_readiness_gate.py tests/test_arbitrage_sample_dataset_plan.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_source_evaluation.py tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py tests/test_arbitrage_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_contract.py tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py tests/test_strategy_candidate_registry.py tests/test_strategy_next_bundle.py --rootdir=tests -q

candidate_registry_status_for_crypto_d1_.lane_status_override_active: WATCH (fires because the seed's extra_files now include 8 docs total: protocol + data_contract + dataset_manifest + qa_freeze_spec, all on disk)
guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path
no QA harness execution in this bundle

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Both arbitrage and crypto_d1 are now WATCH (same +15 bonus). Arbitrage still wins via the existing protocol-first / data-first scoring hints in its queue item. Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. Operator should consult both lanes' next-step lists to pick the actual Bundle 15.

how_this_follows_dataset_manifest: Crypto-D1 Dataset Manifest v1 (Bundle 13) declared 'Crypto-D1 Data QA / Freeze Spec v1 (P2)' as the next required future artifact and defined the per-dataset manifest schema this QA spec consumes.
This bundle authors the QA / freeze SPECIFICATION -- spec only; no QA harness is executed, no data is fetched, no backtest is run, no dataset is processed, no real data files are created.
All seven safety flags from the protocol / data contract / dataset manifest carry verbatim into the QA / freeze spec.
Lane scope is identical: BTC / ETH / SOL, spot only, daily only, 24/7; perps and intraday remain separately-future protocols.

QA_check_group A_manifest_integrity binds the QA harness to the dataset_manifest spec: every dataset's manifest must validate against crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_check.py before any other QA group is allowed to proceed.
QA_report_schema.required_fields include 'manifest_version', 'data_contract_version', and 'protocol_version' -- so any future qa_report.json pins all three layers explicitly.

Freeze rules mirror the dataset manifest's freeze_fields one-for-one (no mutable data in backtest; CHECKSUMS.txt + FREEZE_RECORD.txt; new version on any change; daily bars must be UTC-normalized; weekday-only calendars forbidden).
recommended_next_bundle: Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1 (P3 / P4) -- pre-registration memo for the FIRST candidate strategy family + IS / OOS split. Plan only, no backtest run.
Crypto-D1 Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 -- written assessment of which offline data sources could later satisfy this QA / freeze spec. Memo only, no fetch.
Crypto-D1 Data Acquisition Authorization Draft -- still spec-only; only if the operator wants to start the path toward an actual P2 acquisition. Does not authorize anything by itself.
